_note: SELF-HOST repurposing of the RE-RANK 08 schema (D21): each 'slice' = one remaining PROMPT-BUILD, not a product slice. done_sentinel = the disk path whose presence+validity == that build shipped (orchestrator STEP-0 derived-state key; D14/D20 analog). roadmap_version 3 = CR-001 re-rank (aprd v3→v4): greenfield 10 builds reconciled to completed[] (all shipped on disk); bugfix-spine builds appended as the new remaining_sequence. Bugfix sentinels live in _fixtures/brownfield-bugfix/ (the build loop produces each golden + the both-directions oracle; head-start prompt edits already committed — re-run harmless, D20). Slice pathing under brownfield-bugfix finalized at P-BUGFIX-FIXTURE-BASELINE.

remaining_sequence.name: brownfield-bugfix fixture baseline + CR
remaining_sequence.unit: _fixtures/brownfield-bugfix/ (immutable baseline = greenfield-clean demo-accepted + the defect report CR)
remaining_sequence.rationale: Establishes the both-directions oracle root: buggy baseline (null billable-rate crashes project-list, S4 surface) + defect report. Prereq for every bugfix-overlay golden. Mirrors brownfield-feature fixture.

remaining_sequence.name: DIAGNOSE bugfix defect-localize mode
remaining_sequence.rationale: Headline bugfix role. New intake mode: reproduce+localize a reported defect → root-cause verdict written to .aprd/diagnosis.json (ROOT_CAUSE source for SYNTHESIZE — forward contract from intake overlay 2a).

remaining_sequence.name: SYNTHESIZE bugfix CR aPRD golden (CLASS_EXTENSION)
remaining_sequence.rationale: Intake overlay head-start (committed 60e8b99); golden owed. Version-bump aPRD with CLASS_EXTENSION (bugfix) = REPRO_STEPS/ROOT_CAUSE(from diagnosis.json)/BLAST_RADIUS/REGRESSION_GUARD.

remaining_sequence.name: DERIVE-TESTS bugfix reproduction-test mode
remaining_sequence.rationale: Author the reproduction test spec (the red→green assertion of the correct behavior the defect violates).

remaining_sequence.name: MATERIALIZE-ORACLE bugfix repro+regression mode
remaining_sequence.rationale: Materialize the reproduction layer (red) + the scoped regression layer (BF4, baseline AC stays green). oracle_layers: [reproduction, regression].

remaining_sequence.name: IMPLEMENT bugfix minimal-fix mode
remaining_sequence.rationale: Minimal fix at the root cause; edits existing src scoped to BLAST_RADIUS (BF4); flips reproduction red→green.

remaining_sequence.name: VERIFY-OUTPUT bugfix repro+regression-green mode
remaining_sequence.rationale: Assert reproduction flipped red→green AND regression stayed green (verify_method: inherited ladder + reproduction-must-flip + regression-must-stay-green).

remaining_sequence.name: brownfield-bugfix planted defects + both-directions e2e
remaining_sequence.rationale: Plant defects (regression breaks baseline AC; fix-does-not-flip-red; off-blast-radius edit) so each rejecting role FAILs while the golden PASSes. Both-directions oracle complete (BF4). e2e clean-room validated.
